channel.title: RTO on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in RTO on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Instant Access via application consistent restore points
item.description:
Azure added Instant Access for VM Restore Points in public preview. It lets you restore disks immediately after a restore point is created, without waiting for background replication.

  • Source: Azure Updates
